case_title: PATEL, NASIR vs. WALTER, PATRICK L.

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR AS TO DEFENDANT WALTER, PATRICK L. SUMMONS ISSUED
